title: Sagrika Chugh | Data, Insights & Research Professional
text: Sagrika Chugh is a PhD-trained data, insights and research professional working across analysis, evidence generation, reporting, evaluation, reproducible workflows, accessibility and inclusion. The site includes about, capabilities, experience, selected work and email contact.

title: Mock Niche Explorer
text: Privacy-safe mock ShinyCell2-style interface showing UMAP-style views, feature selection, metadata controls and collaborator-facing exploration using invented data only.
